zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret FitzGerald於1269年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達阿時，她的父親Thomas Fitz Maurice53歲，母親Rohese St Michael36歲。她於1294年與Sir John Cusack在愛爾蘭庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托結婚。他們至少是12個兒子的父母。她去世在愛爾蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret FitzGerald于1269年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達阿时，她的父亲Thomas Fitz Maurice53岁，母亲Rohese St Michael36岁。她于1294年与Sir John Cusack在爱尔兰庫迪 米亞斯格勒亞德斯托结婚。他们至少是12个儿子的父母。她去世在爱尔兰。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret FitzGerald was born in 1269, in Athy, County Kildare, Ireland, her father, Thomas Fitz Maurice, was 53 and her mother, Rohese St Michael, was 36. She married Sir John Cusack in 1294, in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Ireland. They were the parents of at least 12 sons. She died in Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret FitzGerald est née en 1269, à Athy, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, Thomas Fitz Maurice, avait 53 ans et sa mère, Rohese St Michael, avait 36 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John Cusack en 1294, à Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlande. Ils ont eu au moins 12 fils. Elle est décédée à Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret FitzGerald 1269 in Athy, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Thomas Fitz Maurice 53 und ihre Mutter Rohese St Michael 36. Sie hat 1294 in Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irland Sir John Cusack geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 12 Söhne. Sie starb in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret FitzGerald è nata il nel 1269 nel Athy, County Kildare, Irlanda, sua padre, Thomas Fitz Maurice, aveva 53 anni e sua madre, Rohese St Michael, aveva 36 anni. Lei sposato Sir John Cusack nel 1294, nel Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Erano genitori di almeno 12 figli. Morì nel Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Margaret FitzGeraldが1269年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアアシーで生まれた時，父Thomas Fitz Mauriceは53歳，母Rohese St Michaelは36歳であった。1294年にアイルランドコウントイ メアスジャーラルドストウンでSir John Cusackと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも12人の息子の親であった。彼女はアイルランドで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret FitzGerald(이)가 1269년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 앳히에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Thomas Fitz Maurice(은)는 53세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Rohese St Michael(은)는 36세였다. 그녀는 1294년 아일랜드 카운티 미스 그라르드스타운에서 Sir John Cusack(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 열 명 이상의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 아일랜드에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret FitzGerald nasceu em 1269, em Athy, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, Thomas Fitz Maurice, tinha 53 anos e sua mãe, Rohese St Michael, tinha 36 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John Cusack em 1294, em Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Eles tiveram pelo menos 12 filhos. Ela faleceu em Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret FitzGerald родилась в 1269 г. в местности ати, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, её отцу по имени Thomas Fitz Maurice было 53 года, а матери, которую звали Rohese St Michael, 36. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John Cusack в 1294 г. в местности джиррардстоун, коунти мит, Ирландия. У них было по крайней мере 12 сыновей. Она умерла в местности Ирландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret FitzGerald nació en 1269, en Athy, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, Thomas Fitz Maurice, tenía 53 años y su mamá, Rohese St Michael, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Sir John Cusack en 1294, en Gerrardstown, County Meath, Irlanda. Fueron padres de por lo menos 12 hijos. Murió en Irlanda.
